data.title: Chamath Palihapitiya Says 'Time Favors Trump,' Sees A Big Opportunity To Rewrite Global Economics With 'The Mar-A-Lago Accords'
Truist Securities Bullish As MACOM Technology Taps AI, Satellites For Next Wave Of Growth
data.description: Truist Securities analyst William Stein initiated coverage on MACOM Technology Solutions Holdings with a Buy rating and $125 price target, citing growth in RF and similar components and recent acquisitions boosting financial metrics.

data.title: Joby Aviation Not Expected To Outperform As Tariffs, Trade Tensions Cloud Aerospace Outlook
data.description: Analyst downgrades Joby Aviation, Inc. from Over-Weight to Equal-Weight, citing risks from tariffs and slower economic growth.

data.title: Inflation Might Be Easing But Tech Outlook Still Choppy, Analysts Warn
data.description: U.S. inflation dropped to 2.4% in March, below forecasts, while tariffs create fresh risks for markets and consumers amid global supply chain strain.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Rally And 'Could Be In For A Very Fun Weekend' If One Key Level Flips
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are trading higher on Friday, amid Florida passing a Bitcoin reserve bill.
